user_intent: Hermes must not skip brief, gates, source verification, or cleanup safety.
The wrapper must not execute target repository install/build/test/run commands.
The wrapper must expose artifact paths needed for agent review and synthesis.

checks.description: Script command entrypoints reject missing or malformed required arguments with explicit errors.
criteria: usage text lists required command shapes
missing required arguments call die before invoking git-scv

checks.description: Script flow does not bypass inspect/snapshot artifact generation before briefing.
criteria: inspect delegates local package creation to git-scv case create
snapshot creates a case package and then points to snapshot/run
brief is printed after inspect and snapshot

checks.description: Script exposes contract-v2 artifacts needed by agents and humans.
criteria: artifact_manifest.json is visible in case info
brief.json and brief.md are visible in case info
review, security, gates, sensitive, and slices artifacts are visible
architecture.html and architecture map artifacts are visible

checks.description: Script makes gate review artifacts and briefing entrypoints first-class.
criteria: gates.json path is printed
brief command is printed
brief subcommand delegates to git-scv case brief
next-action command delegates to git-scv case next-action

checks.description: Script case packages are created under a configured root and deletion is scoped to that root.
criteria: case root is provided through GIT_SCV_CASE_ROOT
new cases are created by git-scv case create
cleanup delegates to git-scv case delete/prune

checks.description: Install and update commands use the documented cargo install path for Git-SCV itself.
criteria: install supports a pinned commit revision
update-latest is explicit and separate from pinned install
uninstall uses cargo uninstall git-scv

checks.description: Script output does not claim the inspected target is safe, trusted, clean, secure, safe-to-install, or safe-to-run.
criteria: commands describe inspection and briefing, not safety guarantees
case info points to artifacts for review instead of declaring safety

checks.description: Script exposes coverage, graph, synthesis, and follow-up artifacts so unsupported surfaces and unresolved edges remain visible.
criteria: connection_graph.json is visible
architecture.html and visualization_index.json are visible
analysis_plan.json is visible
cross_unit_analysis.json, synthesis.json, and followup_plan.json are visible

checks.description: The wrapper never runs target repository install/build/test/run commands.
criteria: script does not invoke npm install, pip install, docker build, docker run, brew install, or curl pipe shell patterns
cargo install is only used for Git-SCV installation

checks.description: A case-producing command prints the mandatory brief before any next action.
criteria: inspect calls git-scv case brief after printing case info
snapshot calls git-scv brief after printing case info
brief command is listed as mandatory

checks.description: Script-level output avoids raw target command execution details and points to redacted artifacts instead.
criteria: case info prints artifact paths
script does not echo raw package script values
error paths are emitted through die

checks.description: Script does not present execution as available without source-bound review artifacts.
criteria: artifact_manifest.json and brief.json are exposed
script has no run/install target command helper
next-action command is exposed before execution approval

checks.description: Gate-related artifacts remain visible before any approval discussion.
criteria: gates.json path is printed
brief output is printed
connection graph and synthesis paths are visible
gate_decisions.json path is printed

checks.description: Cleanup is limited to harness case packages and cannot delete arbitrary source paths.
criteria: cleanup delegates to git-scv case delete
cleanup-all delegates to git-scv case prune
wrapper does not directly delete case directories

checks.description: Destructive cleanup commands require exact acknowledgement phrases.
criteria: single cleanup requires --ack delete-git-scv-case
cleanup-all requires --ack delete-all-git-scv-cases
main dispatch passes cleanup-all arguments through

checks.description: Failures are reported through stable harness error messages instead of uncontrolled command output.
criteria: die writes a single error line to stderr
argument validation occurs before git-scv commands
script avoids shell eval

checks.description: The script aligns with artifact no-leak and contract-v2 usage by surfacing artifact paths rather than raw evidence.
criteria: artifact_manifest.json is surfaced
architecture.html is surfaced
brief and report artifacts are surfaced
raw target command bodies are not printed

checks.description: Script failure paths are narrow and do not concatenate untrusted target command bodies.
criteria: die is the common error path
unsupported command falls back to usage and die
no eval is used

checks.description: Brief and gate review are promoted before agent next actions.
criteria: brief command is first-class
gates.json and brief artifacts are visible
case-producing commands print git-scv brief
next-action blocker command is first-class

checks.description: Cleanup follows case package deletion safety requirements.
criteria: delete requires exact ack
delete is delegated to Rust case CLI
delete relies on .git-scv-case.json sentinel

checks.description: Source and gate binding artifacts are made visible to the agent.
criteria: artifact manifest and brief paths are printed
review, security, and gates artifacts are printed
brief is available as a command
next-action is available as a command

checks.description: The script does not treat target repository instruction files as operator instructions.
criteria: script accepts only explicit CLI arguments
script does not source files from the target repository
script does not eval target content

checks.description: Graph, analysis plan, cross-unit synthesis, synthesis, and follow-up artifacts are visible.
criteria: connection_graph.json is printed
architecture.html and architecture map artifacts are printed
analysis_plan.json is printed
cross_unit_analysis.json, synthesis.json, and followup_plan.json are printed

checks.description: Package-manager and download-path expansion remains no-exec from the target repository perspective.
criteria: script does not run target package managers
script does not run target containers
snapshot delegates to git-scv snapshot with checksum

checks.description: Every file under scripts/ appears in the script inventory.
criteria: mechanical test compares filesystem scripts to inventory scripts

checks.description: Every inventory module has a traceability entry.
criteria: mechanical test compares inventory module IDs to traceability module IDs

checks.description: Mechanical tests validate checklist IDs, script contract strings, and no target package-manager execution patterns.
criteria: tests/script_contract.rs parses all script verification JSON files

checks.description: The final stage verifies that every checklist item is covered.
criteria: mechanical test fails if any checklist item is uncovered
